item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-048","score":1,"pass_criteria_met":false,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer rejects the framing and eventually gives the right main distinction: prompt engineering is closer to task/interface design than mere wording. However, the first sentence is only “不完全是,” not the corrected main judgment with definition ownership as required. It avoids a concessive “有道理但...” opening and is not a field-list opening, so this is partial rather than failure."}
